offer: For property managers handling 5–15 properties/month, inconsistent maintenance schedules cause tenant complaints. We send reminders instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets or calendars.
problem: Inconsistent maintenance schedules lead to delayed repairs and tenant complaints.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Community forums for property management tools
try_it: Let users try maintenance tracking on 1-3 properties
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing maintenance data
